text: Add human-dependend state to default initial states
description:
Add "human-dependent" status to the default initial statuses when creating new .bowman projects.

**HUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED:**
Current default statuses in new projects: open, done, cancelled, partially, failed, unclear

**Should we add:**
- human-dependent (for aims blocked by human action/decision)
-> yes

**Questions:**
1. Should this be in default statuses for all new projects?
-> exactly
2. Should we add any other useful default statuses?
-> we add only human-dependent to the current list
3. Color choice for human-dependent: #bf409f (current in this project) - acceptable?
-> acceptable!

status.comment: Added human-dependent to initial project statuses with requested color.
